componentDescription: A versatile chat interface for displaying messages, handling user input, and managing conversation context.

messages.description: An optional array of message objects to be displayed within the chat widget.

inputValue.description: An optional controlled value for the chat input field.

onInputChange.description: Callback function triggered when the value of the chat input field changes.

onSubmit.description: Callback function triggered when a message is submitted via the chat input.

inputPlaceholder.description: Optional placeholder text to display in the chat input field when it's empty.

disableInput.description: A boolean flag to disable the chat input field, preventing user interaction.

variant.description: Specifies the visual variant or style of the chat widget.

size.description: Specifies the size of the chat widget (e.g., small, medium, large).

showTimestamps.description: A boolean flag to determine whether timestamps should be displayed with each message.

enableAttachments.description: A boolean flag to enable or disable the attachment functionality within the chat.

enableContextPicker.description: A boolean flag to enable or disable the context picker functionality.

selectedContextElements.description: An array of selected context elements, where each element has an ID and a name.

onContextPickerClick.description: Callback function triggered when the context picker button is clicked.

onRemoveContextElement.description: Callback function triggered when a context element is to be removed by its ID.

isLoading.description: A boolean flag indicating if the chat widget is currently in a loading state.

loadingText.description: Optional text to display when the chat widget is in a loading state.

styles.description: Optional custom styles to apply to various parts of the chat widget.

maxHeight.description: Specifies the maximum height of the chat widget.
